productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Check Red Ties
description: Classic to the hilt and smart to look at, this shaded pink tie from indigo nation comes with pinstripes and diamong print that lends it a sophisticated look, making it a perfect match for a variety of dress shirts. Length: 153 cm Made of 100% handmade microfibre for durability and easy use Has horizontal silver pinstripes with diamond shapes for style Designed with a fading effect One loop with brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care only dry clean
